summary: Encrypted messaging app planning: end-to-end encrypted messaging with optional encrypted on-chain storage restricted to sender/receiver principals.
architectural_notes: If implementing on-chain message storage, store only encrypted ciphertext and restrict read access by sender/receiver principals (public addresses).

existing_features.title: Update the frontend message detail view to load the message via the new single-message backend API (by id) and handle authorization/not-found errors with clear English UI messaging.
Update user-facing labels to clearly refer to the two message participants as 'Sender' and 'Receiver' (Principals) wherever the message participants are displayed in message details.

new_feature_requests.summary: Implement encrypted on-chain message storage with access restricted to sender and receiver public addresses (principals).

Ensure encrypted message records are stored on-chain as ciphertext only, and each stored message includes both participant public addresses as Principals (sender and receiver) so that authorization can be enforced using those two Principals.

Add a backend API to fetch a single message by id that only returns the message if the authenticated caller Principal is either the sender Principal or the receiver Principal for that message; otherwise reject with an authorization error.

projectName: Encrypted on-chain message storage restricted to sender/receiver principals
